name: Unanet ERP for Government Contractors API
what_it_does: Unanet cloud ERP REST API for government contractors and professional services firms with project accounting, DCAA compliance, and business development. Enables AI agents to manage project cost accounting and labor charging for government contract compliance, handle DCAA-compliant timesheets and audit trail for federal contractor billing integrity, access project budget and earned value management (EVM) for government program reporting, retrieve indirect rate allocation and cost pool management for overhead compliance, manage proposal and opportunity tracking via GovWin IQ integration for BD pipeline automation, handle employee time and expense processing for professional services billing, access contract modification and task order management for multi-contract operations, retrieve DCAA ICE (Incurred Cost Electronic Submission) data for annual incurred cost proposal, manage subcontract management and B2G compliance for prime contractor operations, and integrate Unanet with Deltek, government systems, and professional services platforms.
use_cases: Processing timesheets from DCAA compliance agents
Managing project costs from government contract agents
Tracking proposals from BD pipeline agents
Generating incurred cost data from compliance reporting agents
not_for: Non-government contractors without project accounting needs
Commercial professional services without DCAA requirements
Large contractors requiring Deltek Costpoint-scale ERP
best_when: A small-to-mid-size government contractor (DoD and civilian agencies) or professional services firm wanting AI agents to automate DCAA-compliant timekeeping, project cost accounting, indirect rate management, BD pipeline, and government contract billing.
avoid_when: DCAA SAME-DAY TIMESHEET COMPLIANCE: Automated timesheet submission in Unanet must be created on the day labor is performed; automated backdating or post-fact labor charging creates DCAA timekeeping violation and False Claims Act exposure for the contracting entity. FAR UNALLOWABLE COST SEGREGATION: Automated cost allocation must exclude FAR 31.205 unallowable costs from government contract charges; automated misallocation of entertainment, interest, or lobbying costs creates False Claims Act liability. ITAR/CMMC for defense work — Unanet project data for ITAR-controlled programs or CUI must be accessed only in CMMC-compliant environments; automated data access from non-compliant cloud environment violates DFARS 252.204-7012. Incurred cost submission accuracy — automated annual ICE submission data must reconcile to audited financial statements; automated ICE with reconciliation errors creates DCAA audit finding and potential questioned costs.

auth.notes: Unanet uses OAuth 2.0. REST API with JSON. Dulles, Virginia HQ. Founded 1988. Private (Accel-KKR PE). Government contractor ERP for small-to-mid-size federal contractors. 3,200+ government contractor customers. Cloud-first ERP with DCAA compliance. GovWin IQ BD integration. Competes with Deltek Costpoint and JAMIS for government contracting ERP.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-user annual cloud subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; ERP and CRM modules priced separately
pricing.notes: Dulles VA. Accel-KKR PE. Founded 1988. 3,200+ GovCon customers. Cloud-first ERP. GovWin IQ integration. DCAA compliance focus. Per-user annual subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in Unanet developer documentation

known_agent_gotchas: DCAA SAME-DAY TIMESHEET ENTRY: Automated timesheet creation must be on the day labor is performed; automated backdated timesheet for prior periods without DCAA waiver creates false billing risk; implement timesheet creation at shift end, not retroactively

FAR UNALLOWABLE COST MAPPING: Automated cost entry must map expense types to allowable/unallowable FAR 31.205 categories; automated expense import without unallowable cost flagging creates government contract mischarging risk
No webhooks — timesheet approval, invoice generation, and project milestone events require polling; no push notification for DCAA-relevant accounting events

Indirect rate sensitivity — automated indirect rate calculation in Unanet depends on cost pool and allocation base accuracy; automated timesheet or cost entry errors that shift indirect rate can cascade to all government contract billing on the same rate structure

ICE reconciliation requirement — automated incurred cost electronic (ICE) submission data must reconcile to general ledger; automated ICE generation without GL reconciliation check creates DCAA audit risk for questioned costs

GovWin IQ opportunity data freshness — Unanet GovWin IQ BD integration provides government opportunity data; automated opportunity scoring depends on GovWin data currency; stale opportunity data creates BD decision errors
agent_readiness.security_notes: GovCon ERP. SOC2, FedRAMP, DCAA. OAuth2. US. Federal contract cost and compliance data.

security_score_components.security_notes: GovCon ERP. SOC2, FedRAMP, DCAA. OAuth2. US. Government contract and labor data.
